summary: Iteration 52: Private Paddy New Features - All 15 backend tests PASSED. Verified g_issued, cash_paid, diesel_paid fields, auto gunny bag creation/update/delete, and select-all/bulk delete UI elements.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: Backend: POST /api/private-paddy correctly stores and returns g_issued, cash_paid, diesel_paid fields
Backend: _create_gunny_entries_for_pvt_paddy() correctly creates 2 gunny entries - IN (bag qty) and OUT (g_issued qty)
Backend: PUT /api/private-paddy/{id} re-creates gunny entries with updated values (delete old, create new)
Backend: DELETE /api/private-paddy/{id} cascades delete to linked gunny entries via linked_entry_id
Frontend: Form dialog has all 3 new fields: pvt-paddy-g-issued, pvt-paddy-cash-paid, pvt-paddy-diesel-paid
Frontend: Table displays G.Iss, Cash, Diesel columns in header
Frontend: Bulk delete button appears when items selected (data-testid=paddy-bulk-delete)
Config: report_config.json has 14 columns including g_issued, cash_paid, diesel_paid with proper alignment and totals
seed_data_creation: Test paddy entries created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: New private paddy fields (g_issued, cash_paid, diesel_paid) fully tested. Auto gunny bag creation verified with linked_entry_id tracking. Select-all checkboxes and bulk delete buttons working in both Paddy Purchase and Rice Sale tables. Existing entry: Annu (Utkela) from move-to-pvt feature.

new_fields.cash_paid: PASSED - Stored, returned, displayed in form and table
new_fields.diesel_paid: PASSED - Stored, returned, displayed in form and table

auto_gunny_entries.create: PASSED - Creating paddy with bag=50, g_issued=10 creates 2 gunny entries (IN:50, OUT:10)
auto_gunny_entries.update: PASSED - Updating paddy re-creates gunny entries with new values
auto_gunny_entries.delete: PASSED - Deleting paddy cascades to delete linked gunny entries

report_config.new_columns: PASSED - g_issued, cash_paid, diesel_paid present with totals

ui_elements.paddy_bulk_delete: PASSED - data-testid=paddy-bulk-delete appears when items selected
ui_elements.table_columns: PASSED - G.Iss, Cash, Diesel columns visible in table
